news.headline: Together AI raises $800M at $8.3B valuation
news.detail: AI infrastructure company enabling enterprises to train and run models on open-source platforms secured Series C led by Aramco Ventures.

news.headline: Norm AI hits $1.2B valuation with $120M round
news.detail: Legal AI platform automating contract management and compliance for enterprises raised Series C from Khosla Ventures after building AI-native law firms.

news.headline: Monogram raises $40M seed for visual AI interface
news.detail: Coursera co-founder's new startup generates interactive user interfaces instead of text responses, backed by DST Global and Lux Capital.

news.headline: Agentic AI adoption accelerates across enterprises in 2026
news.detail: Twenty-three percent of organizations now scaling AI agents that autonomously execute multi-step workflows, with IT and knowledge management leading deployment.
